items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Clippers 127, Bucks 113 — Bennedict Mathurin dropped a team-high 28 points off the bench and Darius Garland added a 15-point, 11-rebound double-double to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Milwaukee Bucks 127-113.

items.title: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday
items.blurb: James Harden Notched Historic Career Feat On Monday —   Los Angeles Clippers guard James Harden entered Monday’s matchup against the Philadelphia 76ers needing just one point to reach a significant career milestone. The Clippers fell to Philadelphia in a closely contested game at the Wells Fargo Center on Tuesday, but Harden delivered 28 points along with six rebounds and five assists.

items.title: Miles McBride: Doesn't return Sunday
items.blurb: Miles McBride: Doesn't return Sunday — McBride (undisclosed) exited Sunday's 111-100 loss to the Thunder in the third quarter and did not return, finishing with zero points (0-3 FG, 0-3 3Pt), one rebound, one assist and one block in 11 minutes. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Miles McBride: Exits to locker room
items.blurb: Miles McBride: Exits to locker room — McBride exited to the locker room in the third quarter of Sunday's game against the Thunder due to an apparent groin issue, Stefan Bondy of The New York Post reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: Raptors score 31 straight vs. Magic in record-breaking run
items.blurb: Raptors score 31 straight vs. Magic in record-breaking run — Watch as the Toronto Raptors go on a 31-0 run between the first and second quarters vs. the Magic, setting a record for the most consecutive unanswered points since tracking began in the 1996-97 season.

items.blurb: Double play: Former top pick Fultz returns to NBA in unique fashion with Raptors — Markelle Fultz’s career has had many stops and starts because of injuries. The former No. 1 overall pick made his return to the NBA with the Raptors on a manic Monday, with the hope of better days ahead.
